definitions.gloss: (for a fruit) to go bad and lose its shape from being overripe or damaged

standard.text: この言葉の定義は「(for a fruit) to go bad and lose its shape from being overripe or damaged」である。
「(for a fruit) to go bad and lose its shape from being overripe or damaged」という意味で使われることが多い。
(for a fruit) to go bad and lose its shape from being overripe or damaged」という概念は重要だ。
その出来事は「(for a fruit) to go bad and lose its shape from being overripe or damaged」の良い例だ。
「(for a fruit) to go bad and lose its shape from being overripe or damaged」という価値観が大切だ。
(for a fruit) to go bad and lose its shape from being overripe or damaged」という考え方は昔から存在する。
「(for a fruit) to go bad and lose its shape from being overripe or damaged」というのは難しい概念だ。
(for a fruit) to go bad and lose its shape from being overripe or damaged」を理解することは重要である。
「(for a fruit) to go bad and lose its shape from being overripe or damaged」という側面から見ると異なる。
(for a fruit) to go bad and lose its shape from being overripe or damaged」という表現は適切だ。
「(for a fruit) to go bad and lose its shape from being overripe or damaged」の意味で使用される。
(for a fruit) to go bad and lose its shape from being overripe or damaged」という判断は妥当だ。
「(for a fruit) to go bad and lose its shape from being overripe or damaged」という概念を日本語で表す。
(for a fruit) to go bad and lose its shape from being overripe or damaged」という視点は有効である。
「(for a fruit) to go bad and lose its shape from being overripe or damaged」の例は多く見られる。
(for a fruit) to go bad and lose its shape from being overripe or damaged」という定義で理解している。
「(for a fruit) to go bad and lose its shape from being overripe or damaged」という意味が込められている。
(for a fruit) to go bad and lose its shape from being overripe or damaged」という考え方に共感する。
「(for a fruit) to go bad and lose its shape from being overripe or damaged」という要素は不可欠だ。
(for a fruit) to go bad and lose its shape from being overripe or damaged」というテーマで議論した。
